rationale: Educ. Code §29.090 governs after-school and summer science programs and their funding via appropriated funds. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values, so the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change creates no direct conflict.
quote: A program provided under this section shall be paid for with funds appropriated for that purpose.
_note: No direct statutory linkage between this provision and the homestead exemption amount. Any indirect fiscal impact on school district revenue would be a budgetary, not a statutory conflict.
